message.content:
Explore the testing patterns in this ASG codebase. I need to understand:
1. How unit tests are structured (look in src/test/java/com/grl/component/)
2. How integration tests work (look in src/test/java/regression/)
3. How test ontologies are set up and used
4. Any existing tests for enum or taxonomy handling

Provide examples of the test patterns used so we can follow them for new taxonomy pattern tests.

content.text: I'll explore the testing patterns in this ASG codebase. Let me start by examining the structure and content of the test directories.
Now let me explore the structure of unit tests and integration tests:
Now let me read several key test files to understand the patterns:
Now let me read more test files to get a complete picture:

content.text: Now let me examine the test configuration files and TestUtil:

content.content:

     2→ontologies:

content.text: Now let me check the test ontology files:

content.content:
1→<?xml version="1.0"?>
     2→<rdf:RDF xmlns="https://example.com/taxonomy/"
     3→     xml:base="https://example.com/taxonomy/"
     4→     xmlns:owl="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#"
     5→     xmlns:rdf="http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#"
     6→     xmlns:xml="http://www.w3.org/XML/1998/namespace"
     7→     xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#"
     8→     xmlns:rdfs="http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#"
     9→     xmlns:skos="http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#"
    10→     xmlns:base="https://www.graphresearchlabs.com/base/"
    11→     xmlns:api="https://www.graphresearchlabs.com/">
    12→
    13→    <owl:Ontology rdf:about="https://example.com/taxonomy/">
    14→        <owl:imports rdf:resource="https://www.graphresearchlabs.com/base/V1.0.2"/>
    15→        <rdfs:comment>Test ontology for taxonomy (enum) properties via named individuals.</rdfs:comment>
    16→    </owl:Ontology>
    17→
    18→    <!-- APIRoot links to API specification -->
    19→    <rdf:Description rdf:about="https://www.graphresearchlabs.com/base/APIRoot">
    20→        <rdfs:subClassOf>
    21→            <owl:Restriction>
    22→                <owl:onProperty rdf:resource="https://www.graphresearchlabs.com/base/hasAPI"/>
    23→                <owl:someValuesFrom rdf:resource="https://example.com/taxonomy/TaxonomyTestAPIV1.0"/>
    24→            </owl:Restriction>
    25→        </rdfs:subClassOf>
    26→    </rdf:Description>
    27→
    28→    <!-- API Specification Class -->
    29→    <owl:Class rdf:about="https://example.com/taxonomy/TaxonomyTestAPIV1.0">
    30→        <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource="https://www.graphresearchlabs.com/base/GRLAPISpecifications"/>
    31→        <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:nodeID="hasTaxonomyResource"/>
    32→        <skos:prefLabel>Taxonomy Test API V1.0</skos:prefLabel>
    33→        <api:apiDisplayLabel>TaxonomyTestAPIV1.0</api:apiDisplayLabel>
    34→    </owl:Class>
    35→
    36→    <owl:Restriction rdf:nodeID="hasTaxonomyResource">
    37→        <owl:onProperty rdf:resource="https://www.graphresearchlabs.com/base/hasResourceSchema"/>
    38→        <owl:qualifiedCardinality rdf:datatype="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#nonNegativeInteger">1</owl:qualifiedCardinality>
    39→        <owl:onClass rdf:resource="https://example.com/taxonomy/TaxonomyTest"/>
    40→    </owl:Restriction>
    41→    <owl:Axiom>
    42→        <owl:annotatedSource rdf:resource="https://example.com/taxonomy/TaxonomyTestAPIV1.0"/>
    43→        <owl:annotatedProperty rdf:resource="http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#subClassOf"/>
    44→        <owl:annotatedTarget rdf:nodeID="hasTaxonomyResource"/>
    45→        <api:apitag>TaxonomyTest</api:apitag>
    46→    </owl:Axiom>
    47→
    48→    <!-- Status Taxonomy Class -->
    49→    <owl:Class rdf:about="https://example.com/taxonomy/Status">
    50→        <skos:prefLabel>Status</skos:prefLabel>
    51→        <skos:definition>Status values for the resource.</skos:definition>
    52→    </owl:Class>
    53→
    54→    <!-- Status Individuals -->
    55→    <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:about="https://example.com/taxonomy/StatusActive">
    56→        <rdf:type rdf:resource="https://example.com/taxonomy/Status"/>
    57→        <skos:prefLabel>Active</skos:prefLabel>
    58→    </owl:NamedIndividual>
    59→
    60→    <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:about="https://example.com/taxonomy/StatusInactive">
    61→        <rdf:type rdf:resource="https://example.com/taxonomy/Status"/>
    62→        <skos:prefLabel>Inactive</skos:prefLabel>
    63→    </owl:NamedIndividual>
    64→
    65→    <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:about="https://example.com/taxonomy/StatusPending">
    66→        <rdf:type rdf:resource="https://example.com/taxonomy/Status"/>
    67→        <skos:prefLabel>Pending</skos:prefLabel>
    68→    </owl:NamedIndividual>
    69→
    70→    <!-- Priority Taxonomy Class -->
    71→    <owl:Class rdf:about="https://example.com/taxonomy/Priority">
    72→        <skos:prefLabel>Priority</skos:prefLabel>
    73→        <skos:definition>Priority levels.</skos:definition>
    74→    </owl:Class>
    75→
    76→    <!-- Priority Individuals -->
    77→    <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:about="https://example.com/taxonomy/PriorityLow">
    78→        <rdf:type rdf:resource="https://example.com/taxonomy/Priority"/>
    79→        <skos:prefLabel>Low</skos:prefLabel>
    80→    </owl:NamedIndividual>
    81→
    82→    <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:about="https://example.com/taxonomy/PriorityMedium">
    83→        <rdf:type rdf:resource="https://example.com/taxonomy/Priority"/>
    84→        <skos:prefLabel>Medium</skos:prefLabel>
    85→    </owl:NamedIndividual>
    86→
    87→    <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:about="https://example.com/taxonomy/PriorityHigh">
    88→        <rdf:type rdf:resource="https://example.com/taxonomy/Priority"/>
    89→        <skos:prefLabel>High</skos:prefLabel>
    90→    </owl:NamedIndividual>
    91→
    92→    <!-- Object Properties for Taxonomy -->
    93→    <owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="https://example.com/taxonomy/hasStatus">
    94→        <skos:prefLabel>Has Status</skos:prefLabel>
    95→        <skos:definition>The status of the resource.</skos:definition>
    96→    </owl:ObjectProperty>
    97→
    98→    <owl:ObjectProperty rdf:about="https://example.com/taxonomy/hasPriority">
    99→        <skos:prefLabel>Has Priority</skos:prefLabel>
   100→        <skos:definition>The priority level of the resource.</skos:definition>
   101→    </owl:ObjectProperty>
   102→
   103→    <!-- TaxonomyTest Resource Class -->
   104→    <owl:Class rdf:about="https://example.com/taxonomy/TaxonomyTest">
   105→        <skos:prefLabel>Taxonomy Test</skos:prefLabel>
   106→        <skos:definition>Resource class to test taxonomy (enum) properties.</skos:definition>
   107→
   108→        <!-- apiID -->
   109→        <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:nodeID="taxApiId"/>
   110→
   111→        <!-- hasStatus - class-based taxonomy -->
   112→        <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:nodeID="hasStatusRestr"/>
   113→
   114→        <!-- hasPriority - class-based taxonomy -->
   115→        <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:nodeID="hasPriorityRestr"/>
   116→    </owl:Class>
   117→
   118→    <!-- apiID restriction -->
   119→    <owl:Restriction rdf:nodeID="taxApiId">
   120→        <owl:onProperty rdf:resource="https://www.graphresearchlabs.com/base/apiID"/>
   121→        <owl:qualifiedCardinality rdf:datatype="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#nonNegativeInteger">1</owl:qualifiedCardinality>
   122→        <owl:onDataRange rdf:resource="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string"/>
   123→    </owl:Restriction>
   124→    <owl:Axiom>
   125→        <owl:annotatedSource rdf:resource="https://example.com/taxonomy/TaxonomyTest"/>
   126→        <owl:annotatedProperty rdf:resource="http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#subClassOf"/>
   127→        <owl:annotatedTarget rdf:nodeID="taxApiId"/>
   128→        <api:apiLabel>TaxonomyTestAPIV1.0</api:apiLabel>
   129→    </owl:Axiom>
   130→
   131→    <!-- hasStatus restriction (someValuesFrom Status class) -->
   132→    <owl:Restriction rdf:nodeID="hasStatusRestr">
   133→        <owl:onProperty rdf:resource="https://example.com/taxonomy/hasStatus"/>
   134→        <owl:someValuesFrom rdf:resource="https://example.com/taxonomy/Status"/>
   135→    </owl:Restriction>
   136→    <owl:Axiom>
   137→        <owl:annotatedSource rdf:resource="https://example.com/taxonomy/TaxonomyTest"/>
   138→        <owl:annotatedProperty rdf:resource="http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#subClassOf"/>
   139→        <owl:annotatedTarget rdf:nodeID="hasStatusRestr"/>
   140→        <api:apiLabel>TaxonomyTestAPIV1.0</api:apiLabel>
   141→    </owl:Axiom>
   142→
   143→    <!-- hasPriority restriction (someValuesFrom Priority class) -->
   144→    <owl:Restriction rdf:nodeID="hasPriorityRestr">
   145→        <owl:onProperty rdf:resource="https://example.com/taxonomy/hasPriority"/>
   146→        <owl:someValuesFrom rdf:resource="https://example.com/taxonomy/Priority"/>
   147→    </owl:Restriction>
   148→    <owl:Axiom>
   149→        <owl:annotatedSource rdf:resource="https://example.com/taxonomy/TaxonomyTest"/>
   150→        <owl:annotatedProperty rdf:resource="http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#subClassOf"/>
   151→        <owl:annotatedTarget rdf:nodeID="hasPriorityRestr"/>
   152→        <api:apiLabel>TaxonomyTestAPIV1.0</api:apiLabel>
   153→    </owl:Axiom>
   154→
   155→</rdf:RDF>
   156→

1→<?xml version="1.0"?>
     2→<rdf:RDF xmlns="https://example.com/cardinality/"
     3→     xml:base="https://example.com/cardinality/"
     4→     xmlns:owl="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#"
     5→     xmlns:rdf="http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#"
     6→     xmlns:xml="http://www.w3.org/XML/1998/namespace"
     7→     xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#"
     8→     xmlns:rdfs="http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#"
     9→     xmlns:skos="http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#"
    10→     xmlns:base="https://www.graphresearchlabs.com/base/"
    11→     xmlns:api="https://www.graphresearchlabs.com/">
    12→
    13→    <owl:Ontology rdf:about="https://example.com/cardinality/">
    14→        <owl:imports rdf:resource="https://www.graphresearchlabs.com/base/V1.0.2"/>
    15→        <rdfs:comment>Test ontology for cardinality restrictions.</rdfs:comment>
    16→    </owl:Ontology>
    17→
    18→    <!-- APIRoot links to API specification -->
    19→    <rdf:Description rdf:about="https://www.graphresearchlabs.com/base/APIRoot">
    20→        <rdfs:subClassOf>
    21→            <owl:Restriction>
    22→                <owl:onProperty rdf:resource="https://www.graphresearchlabs.com/base/hasAPI"/>
    23→                <owl:someValuesFrom rdf:resource="https://example.com/cardinality/CardinalityTestAPIV1.0"/>
    24→            </owl:Restriction>
    25→        </rdfs:subClassOf>
    26→    </rdf:Description>
    27→
    28→    <!-- API Specification Class -->
    29→    <owl:Class rdf:about="https://example.com/cardinality/CardinalityTestAPIV1.0">
    30→        <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource="https://www.graphresearchlabs.com/base/GRLAPISpecifications"/>
    31→        <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:nodeID="hasCardinalityResource"/>
    32→        <skos:prefLabel>Cardinality Test API V1.0</skos:prefLabel>
    33→        <api:apiDisplayLabel>CardinalityTestAPIV1.0</api:apiDisplayLabel>
    34→    </owl:Class>
    35→
    36→    <owl:Restriction rdf:nodeID="hasCardinalityResource">
    37→        <owl:onProperty rdf:resource="https://www.graphresearchlabs.com/base/hasResourceSchema"/>
    38→        <owl:qualifiedCardinality rdf:datatype="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#nonNegativeInteger">1</owl:qualifiedCardinality>
    39→        <owl:onClass rdf:resource="https://example.com/cardinality/CardinalityTest"/>
    40→    </owl:Restriction>
    41→    <owl:Axiom>
    42→        <owl:annotatedSource rdf:resource="https://example.com/cardinality/CardinalityTestAPIV1.0"/>
    43→        <owl:annotatedProperty rdf:resource="http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#subClassOf"/>
    44→        <owl:annotatedTarget rdf:nodeID="hasCardinalityResource"/>
    45→        <api:apitag>CardinalityTest</api:apitag>
    46→    </owl:Axiom>
    47→
    48→    <!-- Data Properties -->
    49→    <owl:DatatypeProperty rdf:about="https://example.com/cardinality/minCardOne">
    50→        <skos:prefLabel>Min Card One</skos:prefLabel>
    51→        <skos:definition>Property with minCardinality 1</skos:definition>
    52→    </owl:DatatypeProperty>
    53→
    54→    <owl:DatatypeProperty rdf:about="https://example.com/cardinality/minCardTwo">
    55→        <skos:prefLabel>Min Card Two</skos:prefLabel>
    56→        <skos:definition>Property with minCardinality 2</skos:definition>
    57→    </owl:DatatypeProperty>
    58→
    59→    <owl:DatatypeProperty rdf:about="https://example.com/cardinality/maxCardOne">
    60→        <skos:prefLabel>Max Card One</skos:prefLabel>
    61→        <skos:definition>Property with maxCardinality 1</skos:definition>
    62→    </owl:DatatypeProperty>
    63→
    64→    <owl:DatatypeProperty rdf:about="https://example.com/cardinality/maxCardThree">
    65→        <skos:prefLabel>Max Card Three</skos:prefLabel>
    66→        <skos:definition>Property with maxCardinality 3</skos:definition>
    67→    </owl:DatatypeProperty>
    68→
    69→    <owl:DatatypeProperty rdf:about="https://example.com/cardinality/exactCardOne">
    70→        <skos:prefLabel>Exact Card One</skos:prefLabel>
    71→        <skos:definition>Property with exactCardinality 1</skos:definition>
    72→    </owl:DatatypeProperty>
    73→
    74→    <owl:DatatypeProperty rdf:about="https://example.com/cardinality/exactCardTwo">
